nasb.text: “Therefore behold, the days are coming,” declares the Lord, “when they will no longer say, ‘As the Lord lives, who brought up the sons of Israel from the land of Egypt,’

esv.text: “Therefore, behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when they shall no longer say, ‘As the Lord lives who brought up the people of Israel out of the land of Egypt,’

cnv.text: “因此，看哪！日子快到，人不再指著那領以色列人從埃及地上來的永活的耶和華起誓，

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，时候将到，那时人不再凭把以色列人带出埃及的耶和华起誓，
